mapper.insert: insert into tbl_post_product ( id, product_category_id, product_price, product_stock ) values ( #{id}, #{productCategoryId}, #{productPrice}, #{productStock} )
mapper.select: select pp.id, pp.product_price, pp.product_stock, pp.product_category_id, pp.created_datetime, pp.updated_datetime, p.title as post_title, p.content as post_content from tbl_post_product pp join tbl_post p on pp.id = p.id where p.member_id = #{memberId} and p.post_status = 'active' order by pp.created_datetime desc

select pp.id, pp.product_price, pp.product_stock, pp.product_category_id, pp.created_datetime, pp.updated_datetime, p.title as post_title, p.content as post_content from tbl_post_product pp join tbl_post p on pp.id = p.id where p.member_id = #{memberId} and p.post_status = 'active' order by pp.created_datetime desc limit #{criteria.count} offset #{criteria.offset}

select pp.id, pp.product_price, pp.product_stock, pp.product_category_id, pp.created_datetime, pp.updated_datetime, m.member_nickname, m.member_handle, p.title as post_title, p.content as post_content, (select count(*) from tbl_post_like pl where pl.post_id = pp.id) as like_count, case when exists ( select 1 from tbl_post_like pl where pl.post_id = pp.id and pl.member_id = #{memberId} ) then true else false end as is_liked, case when exists ( select 1 from tbl_bookmark b where b.post_id = pp.id and b.member_id = #{memberId} ) then true else false end as is_bookmarked from tbl_post_product pp join tbl_post p on pp.id = p.id join tbl_member m on p.member_id = m.id where p.post_status = 'active' order by created_datetime desc limit #{criteria.count} offset #{criteria.offset}
select count(*) from tbl_post_product pp join tbl_post p on pp.id = p.id where p.member_id = #{memberId} and p.post_status = 'active'
select p.member_id from tbl_post_product pp join tbl_post p on pp.id = p.id where pp.id = #{productId} and p.post_status = 'active'
select count(*) from tbl_post_product pp join tbl_post p on pp.id = p.id where p.post_status = 'active'
